outfit_info.outfit_description: The look combines a light blue shirred cotton top with scalloped embroidery layered under a cream cable-knit cardigan, paired with a floral lace-trimmed skirt. Ribbed tights and shearling-lined suede boots complement the softness, creating an airy, tender, and nature-inspired outfit suitable for spring outings.

model_attributes.body: Young girl with slender physique, soft features, and gentle, natural demeanor exuding innocence and calm.
model_attributes.pose: Standing on a dirt path holding a flower basket, head slightly tilted down, gaze focused on the flower in her hand.
model_attributes.background: A lush green setting with sunlit trees, wildflowers, and soft focus depth enhancing pastoral and tranquil ambiance.
